gt_sql: SELECT T3.forename, T3.surname FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.year = 2006 AND T1.name = 'San Marino Grand Prix' AND T2.position = 2
pred_sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.name = 'San Marino Grand Prix'
  AND r.year = 2006
  AND res.position = 2;
question: Who finished second in the San Marino Grand Prix in 2006?
